entry.title: New: CR 24-83 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. ADOPTION of Resolution 24-127, to approve for inclusion in the 2025 Hawai‘i State Association of Counties Legislative Package a proposed State bill to encourage the production of compost by: 1) requiring the State Department of Health to adopt or amend rules to establish a classification system for composting facilities or operations for the purpose of regulating them for health purposes; and 2) allowing composting and co-composting in the Agricultural District, including on lands with class A or B soils; and 2. ADOPTION of Resolution 24-121, to approve for inclusion in the 2025 Maui County Council Legislative Package a proposed State bill to encourage the production of compost by: 1) requiring the State Department of Health to adopt or amend rules to establish a classification system for composting facilities or operations for the purpose of regulating them for health purposes; and 2) allowing composting and co-composting in the Agricultural District, including on lands with class A or B soils.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
